allOf.title: androidManagedAppProtection

customBrowserDisplayName.description: Friendly name of the preferred custom browser to open weblink on Android. When this property is configured, ManagedBrowserToOpenLinksRequired should be true.

customBrowserPackageId.description: Unique identifier of the preferred custom browser to open weblink on Android. When this property is configured, ManagedBrowserToOpenLinksRequired should be true.

deployedAppCount.description: Count of apps to which the current policy is deployed.

disableAppEncryptionIfDeviceEncryptionIs.description: When this setting is enabled, app level encryption is disabled if device level encryption is enabled

encryptAppData.description: Indicates whether application data for managed apps should be encrypted

minimumRequiredPatchVersion.description: Define the oldest required Android security patch level a user can have to gain secure access to the app.

minimumWarningPatchVersion.description: Define the oldest recommended Android security patch level a user can have for secure access to the app.

screenCaptureBlocked.description: Indicates whether a managed user can take screen captures of managed apps

apps.description: List of apps to which the policy is deployed.

deploymentSummary.description: Navigation property to deployment summary of the configuration.

allOf.description: Policy used to configure detailed management settings targeted to specific security groups and for a specified set of apps on an Android device
